_comment: Localised strings for tenant ecolaundry (Ecolaundry). Lang: en. Source of truth: this file. ES is the base catalogue; every key here must mirror the keys in es.json.
location: Which laundry are you at right now?
greetingOpen: Tell me, how can I help you? 🙂
locationClarification: Sorry, can you tell me where the laundry is?
locationInsist: I need to know where you are to help. Where is the laundry?
mataroStreet: We have two laundromats in Mataró: C/ Francisco de Goya 117 and C/ Alemanya 17. Which one are you at?
machineType: Is it a washer or a dryer?
displayWasher: What exactly appears on the washer screen?
displayDryer: What exactly appears on the dryer screen?
displayMachine: What exactly appears on the machine screen? If nothing shows up, just tell me so we know.
centralReturnedChange: Did the central return your change?
centralRetryAfterReview: You may have entered the wrong machine number. Please check the balance on the central and try again with the correct number. Tell me if the machine has now activated.
resolvedWasher: ✅ Perfect. The washer has started correctly.
resolvedMachine: ✅ Perfect. The machine has started correctly.
empathyAngry: Understood, I'm sorry for the situation and I want to help. We'll look into it as soon as possible. Which laundry are you at?
mixedIncidentSlowDown: I understand, let's go step by step to help you. Which laundry are you at?
reassurance: ⚠️ We will review your case manually.
doubleChargeReview: ⚠️ We need to escalate your case to an operator for review.
doubleChargeAllReceived: We have received all the information we need, we will review your case.
noPhotoEscalate: Got it. We'll review it manually to help you.
reaffirmEscalate: We will review your case manually. What is your name?
displayShort: What exactly appears on the screen?
paymentAsk: Were you able to make the payment?
numericCodeAskLetters: Thanks. Do you see any letter before the numbers?
numericCodeIncoherence: Got it. I'm passing this to a manual review.
almDoorGuidance: That message may indicate a closing issue or a garment caught in the door. Carefully open the door, check for any caught garment and close it firmly again. Please tell me if the message has disappeared.
doubleChargeAskUsed: Thanks. Were you able to wash or dry the clothes?
doubleChargeAskNarrative: Got it. Please explain step by step what you have done since you came in. Is it possible you swiped your card more than once at the payment terminal?
doubleChargeAskCardDigits: Thanks. To review it properly, I need the last 4 digits of the card.
doubleChargeAskReceipt: Perfect. Now I need a screenshot of the payment.
doubleChargeClosure: Thanks. With that data we will review it and send you the refund form. Next time, before paying again, contact us and we will help you right away.
unknownDisplayEscalate: Code {display} requires manual review. We'll pass your case for review to help you properly.
code001Explain: Got it. This message can appear when the program was selected before payment and the state didn't reset properly.
code001Escalate: We'll review it manually to help you in the best way possible.
discountCodeAsk: I'll help you. Tell me the exact code as you see it, including any letters.
discountCodeAskLocation: Which town / laundry do you want to use it at?
discountCodeAskMachineNumber: Which machine number do you want to use?
discountCodeAskDoor: Is it loaded and with the door closed?
discountCodeFinalEscalate: Give me a minute, we'll do the checks. If the code is correct, we'll activate the machine for you. 🙂
discountCodeFormatInvalid: The code doesn't match the expected format, we'll review it manually.
al001GuideRetry:
This message usually appears when the process was not done in the correct order. Before contacting support, let's verify the sequence together. Please follow these steps in this order:

1. Load the washer
2. Close the door
3. Go to the payment central and pay
4. Select the machine number and pick up the change if any
5. Go to the selected machine and choose the program
6. Let me know if it works
al001Resolved: Great, issue resolved. Anything else you need?
noChangeResolved: Great, all sorted. Anything else you need?
loyaltyCardRecharge: Insert the card and follow the instructions on the central unit. If you see anything unusual, tell me and we'll check it.
loyaltyCardBuyBase: The loyalty card costs 20€ in cash and only works in the store where it was bought. Which laundry are you at?
faqClosure: Great. If you need anything else, just let me know.
invoiceAskLocation: Sure, I'll help you with the invoice. 🙂 Which laundry did you use?
invoiceAskMachineType: Thanks. Did you use a washer or a dryer?
invoiceAskDate: Which day did you use the service? (you can say "today", "yesterday" or a date)
invoiceAskEmail: Which email should we send the invoice to?
invoiceAskEmailRetry: That email doesn't look valid. Could you write it again, please?
invoiceFinal: Thanks {name}, we'll send you the invoice for {fecha} to your email: {email}. 🙂
angryCustomerEmpathic: I understand your frustration and want to help. We will review it as soon as possible. Which laundry are you at?
locationGatedNotDocumented: We don't have this type of issue documented at {location}. We'll review it manually to help you.
compensationReview: We'll review your case to help you with the most appropriate solution.
refundAskData: We'll review it with you. To process it, I need the last 4 digits of the card, a screenshot of the payment, and a brief summary.
refundEscalateNoPromise: I understand. We will pass the case for review to apply the most appropriate solution.
insistLocationFollowUp: To help you, I first need to know exactly which laundry you are at.
pricingDeflect: I need to check that before confirming the amount.
openingHoursDefault: General opening hours are 8:00 to 22:00 every day of the year.
unknownLocationList: I don't recognize that location. Our laundromats are: {list}. Which one are you at?
defaultHelp: Tell me the next useful detail and I'll help step by step.
operatorHandoffFinal: A human operator will take over your case. Please wait a moment while they review the situation. The chatbot will be deactivated.
flowResumePrompt: Shall we continue with the laundry issue?
